title: crataegus × eriocalyx
intro: Crataegus × eriocalyx, also known as the hybrid hawthorn, is a cross between Crataegus monogyna and Crataegus laevigata, a type of flowering shrub or small tree native to Europe. The medicinal properties of Crataegus × eriocalyx are attributed to its high content of bioflavonoids, flavonoids, and other polyphenolic compounds, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, lower blood pressure, and reduce the risk of heart disease, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and improve symptoms of menopause. Crataegus × eriocalyx can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, capsules, and extracts, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
